description: Machine-readable safe task menu for Agent On-Ramp Coach. Source of truth for the `onramp.mjs menu` command and the markdown menu in templates/safe-task-menu.md.

workflows.name: explain_code
workflows.description: Explain a file, function, module, error, or workflow in plain engineering terms.
workflows.example_prompt: Explain how this module handles retries without changing anything.

workflows.name: summarize_file
workflows.description: Summarize one file or a small set of files before editing them.
workflows.example_prompt: Summarize this file for me before I edit it.

workflows.name: find_risky_areas
workflows.description: Identify likely risk points before a human changes code.
workflows.example_prompt: Where is this change likely to break behavior?

workflows.name: map_change_impact
workflows.description: Map callers, tests, and contracts affected by a proposed change.
workflows.example_prompt: What would be affected if I rename this API field?

workflows.name: create_debug_plan
workflows.description: Turn a symptom or failure into a stepwise debug plan.
workflows.example_prompt: Help me debug this failure without changing code.

workflows.name: explain_test_failure
workflows.description: Explain why a test failed and what evidence supports the explanation.
workflows.example_prompt: Explain this test failure and what I should inspect next.

workflows.name: suggest_tests
workflows.description: Suggest meaningful tests for a planned change.
workflows.example_prompt: Suggest tests for this change before I implement it.

workflows.name: summarize_pr
workflows.description: Summarize a PR or branch diff for human review.
workflows.example_prompt: Summarize this PR so I can review it faster.

workflows.name: review_diff
workflows.description: Review a diff for bugs, regressions, missing tests, and safety issues.
workflows.example_prompt: Review this diff, but do not edit anything.

workflows.name: review_agent_output
workflows.description: Review another agent's changes or plan for correctness and scope drift.
workflows.example_prompt: Check whether this agent output is safe to accept.

workflows.name: draft_handoff_notes
workflows.description: Draft concise notes for another engineer.
workflows.example_prompt: Draft handoff notes for what I learned here.

workflows.name: generate_readme_update_plan
workflows.description: Plan README updates without editing documentation.
workflows.example_prompt: Tell me how the README should change for this feature.

workflows.name: identify_missing_docs
workflows.description: Find documentation gaps for a feature or workflow.
workflows.example_prompt: What documentation is missing for this workflow?

workflows.name: create_small_refactor_plan
workflows.description: Plan a small refactor with scope, risk, and verification.
workflows.example_prompt: Plan a small refactor, but do not edit yet.
